en: Communication rules must define coordination between slinger, spotter, and operator.\nWork Equipment Ordinance, Section 19(1)(3)
Measures must be in place to prevent unauthorized crane use.\nWork Equipment Ordinance, Section 19(1)(10)
Crane operation must be limited to permitted operators.\nWork Equipment Ordinance, Section 19(3)
Daily checks must cover brakes, limit switches, and warnings.\nWork Equipment Ordinance, Section 19(4)
